content_body: My girlfriend and I spent a week here and wish we could of stayed longer! The house, the views, the fireplace, comfy beds, and the warm feeling home made for a very memorable time for us both! We went on a few hikes, kayaking, saw a few waterfalls and then horseback riding.  Ate at a bunch of great restaurants and one of our favorite activities was white water rafting with RaftOne. GREAT HOUSE! - Rob & Danielle
title: Memorable Stay
